rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when the output is a visible feature.
Use visible identifiers and named constants in AGREE contracts when available.
generic_rules: Formulate range assumptions and guarantees using visible variables or named constants.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean helper declarations for range checks: eq range_check : bool = value >= min and value <= max.
Place annex agree blocks in valid component type or implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in type-level contracts.
